titleStmt.title: SII 18.286: original edition by N. Lakshminarayan Rao
No. 286. (B.K. No. 118 of 1933-34.) RĀṆEBENNŪR, RANEBENNUR TALUK, DHARWAR DISTRICT.

p.hi: Stone in the temple of Siddhēs11vara.

summary.p: This inscription referring itself to the reign of Sadāśivarāya is dated in Śaka 1472, Sādhāraṇa, Jyēśhṭha ba. 5, Monday. But for the week-day the details correspond to A.D. 1550, June 4. The week-day, however, was Wednesday.

The record registers the remission of certain taxes on the barbers in the kingdom of Sādāīvarāaya, made by Mahāmaṇḍalēśvara Rāmarājēndra who was pleased with the work of the barbers Timmōja and others.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
© namastuṁgaśirastuṁbicaṁdra
cāmaracāravē . trailōkyanagarā
raṁbhamūlastaṁbhāya saṁ
bhavē . svasti śrī jayādbhu(bhyu)dayaśā
livāhanaśakavaruśa 1472 na(ne)ya
sādhāraṇasaṁvaccharada jēṣṭa bahuḷa 5
sōmavaradalu śrīmānmahārā
jādhirāja rājaparamēśvara kaṭhāri
sāḷva śrīvīrapratāpa śrīsadāsivarā
yamahārāyaru vidyanagariya paṭṭa
ṇadalū sukhasaṁtōśalīlavinōdadiṁ
pruthviyarājyaṁgeyiUtaṁ yiralu śrīsadā
śivamahārāyara dakṣiṇabhujadaṁḍa śrī
maṁnmahāmaṁḍaḷēśvara svāmige syādu (?)drōha
ra gaṁḍa gaḍiyaṁkabhīma ra marājēṁdra maRead rā.
hāla(a)rasugaḷu gaḍḍāda kelasigaḷu tiṁmōja
koṁḍōja bhadrōja yivaru muvarugaḷa kelasa
kke meci maṁnisalāgi dēvara sadāśivarāyaru
A(ā)ḷuvaṁthā rājyadoḷagaṇa gaḍḍada kelasigaḷi
ge teṟuge sidāya manevaṇa kāṇike
kāḍḍāya maduveya suṁka mahanavama(mi)
Āḷu Akala cakra muṁtāgi teṟuvaṁthā te
ṟava pālisabēku Eṁdu binahaṁ māḍala(lā)gi te
ṟuvaṁthādu Ellavanu pālisi sarvvamānyava
māḍidaru yā gaḍada kelasiga kaṣṭakke pālisi
da dharṁmmavanu Āru Āḷupidare naṁma
guru taṁde tāyi gōu brahmaranū sōmōpa
rāga sūryōparāgadali vāraṇāsi kuru
kṣētradali koṁda pāpakke hōharu śrī virupa
śrīma
Digital edition of SII 18.286 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
